curation.synopsis: In the mead-halls of the Fang, a serf recounts a grim tale of the days when the apostate Cardinal Bucharis besieged the Space Wolves' fortress and overran their world. Two warriors stalk the frozen slopes of Fenris: Daegalan, a grizzled veteran, and Hrothgar, a young and eager Blood Claw. Striking from the shadows against the enemy's supply lines, the older Wolf teaches the younger the legend of the Twelve Wolves who fight beside every son of Russ. But when the pair are finally run to ground, Hrothgar reveals there is a Thirteenth Wolf few dare name, and the lesson he has to teach turns darker than any saga. A tale of brotherhood, the wild, and the curse that shadows the Space Wolves.

flags.reason: Roster lists format=novel, but sources show this is a short story from the Legends of the Space Marines anthology (2010), re-released as a standalone ebook in 2016.
